name: 20_both_systems_break_simultaneously
description: Branch 3 / Interaction: BOTH System A AND System B conditions met, both at threshold simultaneously -> both broken flags True.
derivation: Outer pass, gate pass. System A: safe_hwm 3.0 >= cross 2.0 AND current_return -1.5 < safe_hwm 3.0 -> MET. new_vwap_ticks = 2+1 = 3. is_vwap_broken = (3 >= 3) TRUE. System B: current_return -1.5 <= bleed_arm -1.0 TRUE -> new_bleed_ticks = 2+1 = 3. bleed_broken = (3 >= 3) TRUE. Returns (3, 3, True, True). Confirms BOTH systems run independently in the SAME tick.
